completed_tasks.name: Harden test/e2e.sh (env vars, conditional teardown, JSON report)
Guard STAGING_DOMAIN in write_report() against unbound variable
Fix Doppler config names stg/prd in e2e.sh
Rename test image to flat GHCR path csd-hello-world

blockers.description: Coolify deploy fails at Step 7 in ~11s — container exits unhealthy (app UUID eivrumxrijou619cvrzolukn, deployment syfmc0nf4q0r2zier0a4z6zb)
blockers.workaround: Check Coolify dashboard at https://coolify.cicd.streamlinity.com for deployment logs — preserved with --keep

decisions.rationale: operator credential, any team member can push test image

decisions.decision: Flat GHCR image name csd-hello-world (not nested)
decisions.rationale: GitHub API PATCH visibility 404s on nested package names with /
Doppler default template creates stg/prd; staging/production env creation fails silently

decisions.decision: VPS GHCR auth via docker login as root
decisions.rationale: image is private; Coolify daemon uses /root/.docker/config.json for pulls

next_action: Check Coolify dashboard for deployment syfmc0nf4q0r2zier0a4z6zb logs on app eivrumxrijou619cvrzolukn, fix container startup failure, re-run bash test/e2e.sh
context_notes: Phase 2 code is correct — 7/7 automated checks pass, 9/10 E2E steps pass. Only obstacle is the Coolify container deploy. The hello-world image is nginx:alpine on port 3000 with /api/health. provision.sh sets health_check_port=3000 and health_check_path=/api/health. Fast failure (~11s) suggests startup issue not health check timeout.
